ai-1.en: What feels different at work lately?

ai-2.en: What are you noticing in yourself?

ai-3.en: What feels easy to talk about?

ai-7.en: What are you tired of hearing?

ai-12.en: What do you want to protect?

ai-13.en: What do you want to let go of?

ai-14.en: What part of your work feels most alive?

ai-16.en: What do you trust yourself to know?

ai-17.en: What do you wish others understood about your work?

ai-20.en: What have you changed your mind about?

ai-22.en: What do you miss about how work used to feel?

ai-23.en: What do you hope gets easier?

ai-24.en: What do you hope stays difficult?

ai-25.en: Where do you want more room?

ai-26.en: Where do you want more care?

ai-31.en: What do you want to be honest about?

ai-32.en: What do you want us to notice together?

ai-35.en: What would good change feel like?

ai-36.en: What would be a good first step?
